'''ragozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dynasty|dynasty]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-g-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dynasty|dynasty]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ragozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rægezheth|rægezheth]] || [[word:rægezhej|rægezhej]] || [[word:rægezhesh|rægezhesh]] || [[word:rægezhe|rægezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ragogozhoth|ragogozhoth]] || [[word:ragogozhoj|ragogozhoj]] || [[word:ragogozhosh|ragogozhosh]] || [[word:ragogozho|ragogozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ragozhoth|ragozhoth]] || [[word:ragozhoj|ragozhoj]] || [[word:ragozhosh|ragozhosh]] || [[word:ragozho|ragozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ragofzhoth|ragofzhoth]] || [[word:ragofzhoj|ragofzhoj]] || [[word:ragofzhosh|ragofzhosh]] || [[word:ragofzhof|ragofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ragozhotho|ragozhotho]] || [[word:ragozhojo|ragozhojo]] || [[word:ragozhosho|ragozhosho]] || [[word:ragozhoko|ragozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ragozhoth|ragozhoth]] || [[word:ragozhoj|ragozhoj]] || [[word:ragozhosh|ragozhosh]] || [[word:ragozho|ragozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ragozhothol|ragozhothol]] || [[word:ragozhojol|ragozhojol]] || [[word:ragozhoshol|ragozhoshol]] || [[word:ragozhokol|ragozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ragozhothotho|ragozhothotho]] || [[word:ragozhojojo|ragozhojojo]] || [[word:ragozhoshosho|ragozhoshosho]] || [[word:ragozhoko|ragozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ragozhothon|ragozhothon]] || [[word:ragozhojon|ragozhojon]] || [[word:ragozhoshon|ragozhoshon]] || [[word:ragozhokon|ragozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ragozhothoro|ragozhothoro]] || [[word:ragozhojoro|ragozhojoro]] || [[word:ragozhoshoro|ragozhoshoro]] || [[word:ragozhokoro|ragozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
